title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Department of Education-school District of Los Baños to Strengthen the Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Program of the Municipality of Los Baños. Councilor Benedicto S. Alborida 02/06/2023
